title: HTTP Status Codes
description: Quick reference for HTTP status codes: grouped by 1xx–5xx, searchable by code or meaning, with explanations and common scenarios. Offline reference.

notice.title: Offline reference
notice.body: A static cheat sheet — no network requests. Search by code number, English phrase, or meaning.

codes.c100: Continue: headers received, client should send the request body.
codes.c101: Switching Protocols: server agrees to switch per the Upgrade header (e.g. WebSocket).
codes.c102: Processing: received and working, no response yet (WebDAV).
codes.c103: Early Hints: preliminary headers (e.g. preload) before the final response.
codes.c201: Created: succeeded and a new resource was created (typical for POST).
codes.c202: Accepted: accepted but not yet processed (async).
codes.c204: No Content: success with no response body (typical for DELETE / PUT).
codes.c206: Partial Content: a Range request returned partial data (resumable / video).
codes.c301: Moved Permanently: resource permanently at a new URL; update links.
codes.c302: Found: resource temporarily at another URL (legacy behaves like 303).
codes.c303: See Other: GET the result from another URL (post-redirect-get).
codes.c304: Not Modified: cache is still valid (works with ETag / If-Modified-Since).
codes.c307: Temporary Redirect: like 302 but preserves method and body.
codes.c308: Permanent Redirect: like 301 but preserves method and body.
codes.c400: Bad Request: malformed syntax or invalid params.
codes.c404: Not Found: the resource does not exist.
codes.c405: Method Not Allowed: the method is not supported for this resource.
codes.c409: Conflict: conflicts with the current resource state (duplicate / version).
codes.c410: Gone: resource existed but is permanently removed.
codes.c418: I'm a teapot: April Fools' easter egg; can't brew coffee.
codes.c422: Unprocessable Entity: syntactically fine but semantically wrong (form validation).
codes.c429: Too Many Requests: rate-limited; slow down (see Retry-After).
codes.c500: Internal Server Error: an unhandled server-side exception.
codes.c501: Not Implemented: the server does not support the functionality.
codes.c502: Bad Gateway: upstream returned an invalid response (proxy / gateway).
codes.c503: Service Unavailable: overloaded or under maintenance; retry later.
codes.c504: Gateway Timeout: upstream did not respond in time.
codes.c511: Network Authentication Required: authenticate at the network portal first (captive WiFi).
